nasb.text: The mind of the wise is in the house of mourning, While the mind of fools is in the house of pleasure.

esv.text: The heart of the wise is in the house of mourning, but the heart of fools is in the house of mirth.

cnv.text: 智慧人的心在服喪之家， 愚昧人的心在歡樂之家。

ccb.text: 智者的心思考生死大事， 愚人的心只顾作乐。

csbs.text: 智慧人的心在哀悼之家， 愚昧人的心在欢乐之家。
